QA-approved (parallel agent review). Virtual content-stream restructure: wordmark + URL bar + bookmark grid built into List<string>, sliced by [scrollOffset, scrollOffset + viewportHeight). 12 new tests assert rendered output (not just helper math): wordmark hides past offset, URL bar hides past offset, AdjustLauncherScroll keeps selected cell in viewport, URL-bar focus snaps to 0, first-bookmark snaps to top. 71 launcher / 2845 full-unit suite all pass. Live-tested at 24×100 with preserved artifacts at /tmp/launcher_scroll_*.txt showing full→scrolled→snap-back cycle.

QA-approved (parallel agent review). Bridge: IBrowserSession.GetCookiesForUrlAsync (BrowserSession.cs:242-292, real Playwright _context.CookiesAsync call) + :cookies slash command. CookiesCommandHandler import path: enumerate PaywalledDomains → GetCookiesForUrlAsync per domain → aggregate → SaveCookiesAsync → RefreshAsync (sequence verified at CookiesCommandHandler.cs:165-211). 8 unit tests; load-bearing Import_AggregatesCookiesAcrossDomains_PersistsAndRefreshes asserts the full call sequence with realistic cookie shapes. 196/196 cookie+preload tests pass; 2860 full-unit no regressions. Negative-path live-tested at /tmp/cookies_import_evidence.txt (CI cannot reach NYT for positive path). Positive-path close criterion is the 7-step user-side plan in bead notes — user verifies on their machine: log into NYT foreground, run :cookies import, click an article on Today's Paper, observe BuildCache HIT. Auto-detect deferred to workspace-l838.

Live-verified: Program.cs:158-162 explicitly re-adds env vars after the JSON file. Test: launched app with Browser__Headless=true while appsettings.json had Headless: false; log shows 'Creating new Playwright browser session (headless=true)'. Env override now wins as standard .NET convention dictates.

QA-approved round 2 (round 1 rejected for test fraud + missing tests). 6 rows now editable; persistence flows through IUserSettingsStore; 111 targeted + 2860 full-unit tests pass. Live-tested with genuine captures: /tmp/urko_after_save_voice.txt (Voice row, sage), /tmp/urko_edit_model.txt (model picker), /tmp/urko_after_save.txt (Model row, tts-1-hd). Settings round-trip proven via /tmp/urko_settings_after.json containing both OpenAiTtsVoice and OpenAiTtsModel. One honest Skip (bind-time AudioClient interception) — needs factory seam, not blocking.

Phase 1 implemented: BackgroundPreloadService.BrowserPreloadUrlAsync brackets every Page.GotoAsync with IBrowserSession.MinimizeWindowAsync before AND after. CDP Browser.setWindowBounds on the foreground page minimizes the whole window (including the background preload tab, since Playwright's NewPageAsync uses the same window). 116/116 BackgroundPreloadService tests pass. Phase 2 (separate headless preload context — zero foreground tabs ever) filed as follow-up. Live-test gate: this is a visual property only the user can confirm fully. On their machine they should see: at most one background tab, and the foreground window stays minimized throughout preload.

Live-verified per QA audit reopen criteria. Live test (script /tmp/test_6xtr_warn.py): planted dummy OpenAiApiKey in settings.json, no GCS bucket configured. Saved an example.com URL → opened Reading List → :podcast → Esc past cache analysis → navigated to Generate row → pressed Enter. Capture at /tmp/6xtr_warn_panel.txt shows the actual warn panel rendered: '⚠  No GCS bucket configured' / 'The podcast file will be saved locally only — it will not be published as an RSS feed' / file path shown / '[Enter] generate locally', '[b] set up bucket first', '[Esc] cancel'. Gate logic at PodcastConfirmationScreens.cs:927-929 fires correctly in production. Test key removed from settings.json post-verify.

Process rule established and enforced. Every QA-enforcer agent prompt this round explicitly required 'preserved capture artifact in close reason' for visual-acceptance bullets, and rejected closures that didn't have one (workspace-9nuj round 1 rejected for lazy live-test, workspace-fbhj round 1 for fabricated TEST_NO_BRACKETED claim, workspace-urko round 1 for capture fraud + same-buffer-pasted-twice). The pattern is now baked into the dispatch prompt template and every recent close (xrwp, 9nuj, 7via, z4nl, fbhj, urko, 6xtr, 8rqh, 38yg) includes preserved-artifact paths in the close reason. Marking the process bead closed; the rule is operational.

Implemented + live-verified + tests pass. nk8a: npm_config_loglevel=silent + synchronous warmup eliminates BEWARE/download/deprecation noise from TUI; verified with cleared playwright cache. 33jw: unavailable strategies appear as ✗-prefixed disabled rows in chooser; live verified on techmeme without API key shows 3/3 with AI Curated visible; Enter on disabled row shows 'Cannot apply · <reason>' hint. Build clean (0 warnings); 2940 tests pass.

Implemented: removed first-run auto-redirect to Setup. Launcher now shows a focusable cyan 'Set up API keys' hint (selectedIndex=-2) above the bookmark grid when none of the four primary credentials are configured. Auto-focused on first run so Enter still gets users into Setup with one keystroke. Hint hides automatically once any credential is set. Reading flow is unblocked. Verified live via scripts/termtest.py: first-run launcher shows hint + Enter opens Setup; configured user sees no hint; navigation Up/Down moves between hint, URL bar, and bookmarks correctly. Added LauncherSetupHintTests + updated NavigationServiceLauncherTests for the new -2 sentinel. Build: 0 warnings; full suite: 2948 passed / 0 failed / 20 skipped.

Implemented + QA-approved + live-tested. Setup hint moved inside the wordmark/header box (replaces trailing blank line; net header height unchanged); -2 sentinel cleanly removed from LauncherNavigationState clamp, LauncherCommandHandler branches, BrowserOrchestrator pre-focus, and LauncherRenderer (BuildSetupHintLines/SetupHintLines/SetupHintSelectedIndex deleted). Dedicated S keybinding added to LauncherCommandHandler intercepting before URL-bar typing fall-through. Verified live (width 100 + 60 narrow): hint inside header card with 'press S' affordance; S opens Settings; Esc preserves launcher selection; configured users see no hint and S is a no-op. Build: 0 warnings; full suite: 2946 passed / 0 failed / 20 skipped.

Implemented + live-verified. Settings GCS row now accepts pasted JSON content OR a file path (smart detection: leading { OR contains whitespace → JSON; otherwise path). Validator rewritten with user-friendly per-field error messages; ValidateKeyFile defers to ValidateKeyContent for unified behaviour. Status row shows masked client_email (cached at save time, no per-render File.ReadAllText). New helpers: ExtractKeyMetadata, MaskServiceAccountEmail (with 9 unit tests). Migration carve-out: existing path-based saves keep working; the SetServiceAccountKeyContent path writes JSON to {LocalAppData}/WireCopy/gcs-key.json and stores the path so runtime GoogleCredential.FromFile keeps working unchanged. Build: 0 warnings. Targeted tests: 41/41 pass. Full suite: 2954-2957 passing across 5 runs (2-3 pre-existing flaky console-collection tests fail intermittently, none in x7lf code paths — confirmed by stash-and-rerun). Live evidence in /tmp/x7lf-evidence/ — 4 captured screens covering success path (masked email visible: 'wireco…@wirecopy-test-1234'), wrong-type error, bad-JSON error (smart routing fix), missing-field error with per-field guidance. Deferred to follow-ups: dedicated PasteSink component (the existing FormField + bracketed-paste in TerminalInputHandler suffices for the user's bug); persisting JSON content directly in encrypted settings (current write-to-disk-then-store-path approach works correctly).

Implemented + live-verified. New HasIncompleteSetup predicate (returns true when ANY of 4 primary credentials is unset) drives ShowSetupHint instead of the strict IsFirstRun. Partial-setup users now see the hint inside the header card and can press S to reach Setup. Configured users see no hint but S still works (intercept moved out of ShowSetupHint gate). Welcome banner gated separately on IsFirstRun (only first time, not just incomplete). Help popup adds 'S — Setup / settings' to the launcher binding list. Removed now-unused IsFirstRun helper from BrowserOrchestrator. Build: 0 warnings; full suite: 2961 passed / 0 failed / 20 skipped. Live: partial-setup state (only OpenAI key set) → hint visible, S opens Settings without welcome banner; fully-configured → hint hidden, S still opens Settings, ? overlay lists S — Setup.
Implemented inline FormField + prerequisite gate + 3-state probe + in-flow create per spec. Build clean, 2982 tests pass. ?-overlay help deferred to workspace-dlq5.
TextNormalizer applied at LinkExtractor + RssFeedDetector ingestion sites. 2997 tests pass. Build clean.

Defaults switched to gpt-4o-mini-tts + coral + playful-news-anchor instructions. Setup row added. Raw-HTTP fallback used because SDK 2.9.1/2.10.0 don't expose Instructions; follow-up filed as workspace-xott. Build clean, 3008 tests pass.
Boxed cells with dim borders, right-aligned [N] selectors, working 1-9 jump-to-index, ▌ bar dropped. Reading List tile retained in grid per ul5z coordination. Build clean, 3018 tests pass.

Reading List at slot #2 with ANSI 23 secondary-accent bg, slot-ordering applied to all 3 variants, dispatch + undo updated. Subtitle '{N} saved articles' deferred to workspace-fbcn. Build clean, 3032 tests pass.
Tagline pad now matches W column (6 large / 1 narrow). 2 alignment tests added. Build clean, 3034 tests pass.
StatusBar launcher arms throw, RenderOptions gated, footer redesigned (v1.0 → tagline), regression test added. Build clean, 3012 tests pass.

Anthropic dropped, OpenAiHierarchyAnalyzer with strict JSON Schema + reasoning_effort=minimal landed, vision preserved, single-key setup. Build clean, 3006 tests pass. Live verification on real news pages deferred per spec.
ReadingListItemCount on RenderOptions, sync ICollectionService read on launcher render, subtitle helper renders {N} saved articles / empty-state copy. Build clean, 3009 tests pass.
OnExtraKey hook on FormFieldConfig + interceptKey on PromptForInputAsync. Bucket row's ? overlay now renders the 12-line help from the dwgl spec. Build clean, 3012 tests pass.

Replaced off-palette ANSI 23 background fill with in-palette accent treatment: cyan ★ glyph + cyan AccentFg bold title for Reading List. Borders remain consistent with bookmark cards so the grid reads as one coherent surface. All 108 launcher tests pass.
Closed

Implemented per design — saved-link toast + row decrypt-flash. Toast renders 'Saved to Reading List' (Success/Error), row flash uses AccentFg via SaveFlashAnimation wrapping DecryptRevealAnimation. Multi-link save fires count toast only. DisableAnimations skips flash, toast still fires. Fixed pre-existing toast/frame-buffer bug (toast now routes through RenderHelpers.WriteAt). Live screenshot confirms toast visible in tmux capture; 21 CollectionCommandStatusTests pass.
NYT 2026 selector + length-aware quality gate landed. Build clean, 3012 tests passing including 2 new pinned regression tests + committed fixture. QA-approved.
Merged in b8a00eb after QA PASS-WITH-CAVEATS. Live validation tracked under workspace-vfpi (must complete before relying on this code path).

Implemented in 15c6406: HtmlAgilityPack-based sanitizer strips script/style/noscript/svg/iframe (preserves ld+json), redacts base64 data URIs, removes tracker pixels and 1x1 spacers. 5 new unit tests covering each sanitization rule via captured prompt; full suite 3042/0/34 passing.

Implemented in d3f7473: MonthlyTokenBudget config (default 200K, 0 disables) tracked via IUserSettingsStore key AiArticleTokens:YYYYMM. ChatCompleter signature updated to return token count from OpenAI Usage. 4 budget tests; full suite 3046/0/34 passing.

Implemented in 60965bc: Shift+E hotkey for manual regenerate. ArticleLayoutCommandHandler resolves IAiArticleExtractor + ISelectorBasedArticleExtractor + IArticleLayoutStore from scope, runs self-test gate before persist, merges by entry name. 7 unit tests covering wrong-view/no-key/null-result/self-test-fail/save/replace/append. Help overlay updated. Full suite 3053/0/34.

Merged in 7e31056: typed HumanActionRequired pipeline + variant-aware copy + speed/clarity fixes. QA PASS-WITH-CAVEATS (live link-tree badge unreachable in CI, verified via in-process renderer tests). 6 fix commits address all QA punch-list items: _lastBlockedAction clears on success/origin-change, BrowserPreloadUrlAsync publishes typed verdict, MaxBoxContentWidth 46->56, PollForChallengeResolutionAsync removed (verdict emits on first detection).

Implemented in ec9ee8a: PageLoadPipeline escalation gate now also fires when heuristic returns content failing ValidateContentQuality. AI output preferred when it meets the bar; otherwise heuristic's low-quality content is kept as fallback. Live validation tracked under workspace-vfpi (batch with other AI-extractor live tests).

Validation regex now allows underscores in non-dotted bucket names; user-facing error message returns the specific rule that failed instead of listing all constraints. Tests cover both new behaviours. Build: 0 warnings/0 errors. 40/40 GcsBucketNameValidation tests passing.

Readiness banner added directly under the Generate Podcast header explaining the state in one sentence. Generate row label now reflects state (Not ready / Local-only / Publish RSS). PodcastReadinessBannerTests covers each state and includes an end-to-end render check that captures Console output. Build 0 warnings/0 errors; 7/7 banner tests pass; 3124/3125 full suite pass.

Per-rule error messaging implemented as part of workspace-wooa via GcsConfiguration.ExplainBucketInvalid. Every common rule (length / case / consecutive-dot / goog-prefix / underscore-and-dot mix / boundary char) now returns its own message string. Closing as duplicate.

Per-rule error messaging implemented as part of workspace-wooa via GcsConfiguration.ExplainBucketInvalid. Every common rule (length / case / consecutive-dot / goog-prefix / underscore-and-dot mix / boundary char) now returns its own message string. Closing as duplicate.

ClearLine in FormField now wipes the entire row width (0 to WindowWidth-1) regardless of the boxWidth passed in. The chrome immediately overwrites the box columns with actual content; columns past the box are blank instead of showing underlying row content. Build 0 warnings, all 75 FormField+Settings+InlinePattern tests pass.

Bucket field pre-fills with {project_id}-wirecopy-feed when the user has saved an SA key. ResolveBucketSmartDefault reads the saved JSON via the existing ExtractKeyMetadata; pure BuildSmartDefaultBucket helper is unit-tested independently. 8/8 tests pass. Build 0 warnings/0 errors.

Bucket help overlay (?) now includes underscores+dots in the naming rules (correcting the post-wooa contract) and lists three concrete bucket-name examples. SA-key overlay already had comprehensive 4-step walk-through. SA-key + bucket field labels/placeholders/helptext already direct users to expected formats (workspace-ur5h baseline). Closing.

HandleSetKey now runs GcsVerifyOps.AuthenticateAsync immediately after saving the SA key, then surfaces success with the masked email or failure with typed remediation. Status flips through Verifying… → result so the user sees progress. Failure class + message logged; key stays saved (lenient policy — rollback is a follow-up). 93 related tests pass.

Engine path verified: PodcastOrchestrator already runs end-to-end without a GCS bucket. PodcastPublisher.PublishFeedAsync fails gracefully (no bucket → upload throws → publisher returns Success=false), and the orchestrator wraps that as PodcastResult.Successful with feedUrl=null + localFilePath set, so the M4B is preserved. UX surface is now coherent: workspace-hcqc readiness banner says 'Ready — local-only mode'; Generate button label says 'Generate Locally (no RSS publish)'; existing ShowLocalOnlyWarningAsync confirms before generation; completion screen renders the local file path in a box. Local file-based RSS feed.xml generation (vs. just suppressing publish) is a separate follow-up since it requires deciding on file://-vs-localhost URL conventions; not blocking on it.

After verify succeeds, the wizard publishes a placeholder RSS feed.xml to the bucket and surfaces the public URL inline ('↳ Test feed published at https://storage.googleapis.com/<bucket>/feed.xml — open it in a browser to confirm'). Failure is non-fatal: verify result stays positive; skip message is rendered dim. Pure BuildSelfTestFeedXml helper unit-tested (6/6 tests pass).

GcsCredentialVerifier.VerifyAsync now accepts an IProgress<GcsVerifyStep>; each step reports before starting (Auth, Upload, Download, Delete). GcsStorageClient.VerifyCredentialsAsync threads the progress through. PodcastGcsWizard.RunVerifyStepAsync uses a Progress<GcsVerifyStep> handler to set the panel's currentStep authoritatively instead of advancing on wall time. Tests cover happy-path (all 4 fire) and upload-failure (Auth + Upload only). 11/11 verifier tests pass; build 0 warnings.

Multi-format merge implemented: name collision + same matcher shape → replace; name collision + different matcher shape (LdJsonType/UrlPattern/BodyClassContains) → append with deduplicated name (article → article-2). Extracted to ArticleConfigMerger class with 12 unit tests covering null/empty existing, replace path, append-on-LdJsonType-divergence, append-on-UrlPattern-divergence, name walk. PageLoadPipeline delegates via thin wrapper.

Superseded by workspace-bs93. Rather than repair the boxed-cell renderer, the launcher tile style is being redesigned to match the link-list card style (accent bar + bold title + horizontal-rule separator, no box-drawing borders). The 'borders broken' symptom is moot once the box-drawing chars are gone.

Defensive normalization landed on two leak paths: (1) DiskCacheStore.LoadAllBuildCaches now runs DisplayText/Author/SectionTitle through TextNormalizer.NormalizeDisplayText on read, so historic cache entries with raw ' ' get cleaned up — null fields pass through unchanged. (2) PageLoader page-metadata assembly now wraps Title/Description/Author in the normalizer to strip U+00A0 that WebUtility.HtmlDecode leaves behind. 18 entity tests + 218 related tests pass; build 0 warnings.

Implemented and verified via unit tests and QA-enforcer review on worktree-podcast-p0-fixes. jc2v: Utf8StringWriter replaces StringWriter in PodcastFeedGenerator; new PodcastFeedGeneratorEncodingTests asserts encoding="utf-8" + no utf-16. mie2: LogWarning→LogError; SkippedEpisode list; refuse to upload feed.xml when all skipped; zero-byte M4B fails loudly; orchestrator logs path+bytes pre-publish. nb6b: IFeedReachabilityProbe + FeedReachabilityProbe HTTP-GETs feed.xml post-upload, classifies BucketNotPublic / FeedNotParseable / NetworkUnreachable. 3190 tests pass; 0 warnings/errors. QA enforcer notes that live-bucket integration verification belongs on workspace-ke3n (umbrella) post-deploy.

Root cause was the UTF-16 encoding declaration (now fixed in workspace-jc2v). Confirmed live: new feed.xml at gs://tr_list_reader/podcasts/.../feed.xml declares encoding="utf-8", contains 1 valid <item> with playable audio enclosure, parses cleanly.
